query: SELECT AVG(m.unitPrice) as avgCost, MAX(m.unitPrice) as maxCost, MIN(m.unitPrice) as minCost FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.matchedItemName = 'Salmon' AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT AVG(m.unitPrice) as avgCost, MAX(m.unitPrice) as maxCost, MIN(m.unitPrice) as minCost FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.matchedItemName = 'Salmon' AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131;
